title: Token-telemetry S7: evolve tokens report --last N (top consumers by phase/site/cycle/lane — the operator answer to LOCATE MAX TOKEN USAGE) + cyclecost prefers sidecar truth. DEPENDS: token-telemetry-s6 shipped
summary: New CLI reusing budgethistory's cycle walk: rank phases/sites by input tokens, cache-hit trend, waste class per cycle/lane. cyclecost switches to sidecar-preferred source with events-parse fallback (ONE aggregation model, no third path). FULL DESIGN: docs/plans/token-telemetry-2026-07.md (read it first; RED tests named there verbatim are the acceptance contract).
acceptance: go vet, -race, apicover -enforce green; cmd-layer test per test-coverage-audit conventions
